title: SCBE Coding Approval Metrics v3 Marker-Focus Scaffolded HF T4
description: Production-gated variant of the marker-focus repair profile. Raw generation remains diagnostic, while the deterministic scaffold emits exact approval marker receipts before adapter promotion.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE approval-gate marker fidelity specialist. Copy required marker strings exactly before giving the compact approval verdict. Do not translate, rename, case-fold, pluralize, hyphenate, underscore, or approximate required markers.
notes: This profile promotes only through the deterministic approval receipt scaffold.
Raw model responses are still recorded as raw_ok/raw_missing_required in the gate report for diagnostic pressure.
Use this as the production approval surface while continuing raw-copy training separately.
